question: Counter-Strike: TDK vs HAVU (BO3) - NODWIN Clutch Series Play-In Group A
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between TDK and HAVU in the NODWIN Clutch Series Play-In Group A, scheduled for February 13 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "TDK" if TDK win the match against HAVU.

This market will resolve to "HAVU" if HAVU win the match against TDK.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org/.

This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Yellow Submarine and NAVI Junior in the CCT Series 7 Group A, scheduled for February 13 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if Yellow Submarine and NAVI Junior play 3 or more games in this series.

If fewer than 3 games are played, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Ursa and PRIME in the CCT Europe Closed Qualifier: Series #16 Group C, scheduled for February 13 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Ursa" if Ursa win the match against PRIME.

This market will resolve to "PRIME" if PRIME win the match against Ursa.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org/.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 14, 6PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if P.J. Washington records more than 1.5 assists during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if P.J. Washington records 1.5 assists or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

events.title: Mavericks vs. Lakers
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for February 12 at 10:00PM ET:
If the Mavericks win, the market will resolve to "Mavericks".
If the Lakers win, the market will resolve to "Lakers".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

question: Will Jynxzi & Joe Bart win Jynxzi's Rocket League tournament?
description:
This market will resolve to the winner of Jynxzi's Rocket League tournament, currently scheduled for Sunday, February 15th, 2026.

In the case of a tie between multiple teams this market will resolve in favor of the Team whose listed team name comes first alphabetically.

If this tournament is cancelled, postponed after February 28, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or a winner has not been declared within this timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the tournament organizer, Jynxzi (primarily via his Twitch channel); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 14, 8PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: South Dakota State Jackrabbits vs. Denver Pioneers: O/U 160.5
description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for February 12 at 9:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the South Dakota State Jackrabbits and Denver Pioneers combine to score 161 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 161, this market will resolve to "Under".

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: South Dakota State Jackrabbits vs. Denver Pioneers
events.description:
This event is for the CBB game between South Dakota State Jackrabbits and Denver Pioneers on February 12 at 9:00 PM ET.

question: Trail Blazers vs. Jazz: O/U 233.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for February 12 at 9:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Trail Blazers and Jazz combine to score 234 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 234, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Trail Blazers vs. Jazz
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for February 12 at 9:00PM ET:
If the Trail Blazers win, the market will resolve to "Trail Blazers".
If the Jazz win, the market will resolve to "Jazz".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

question: Counter-Strike:  CSDIILIT vs Atreides (BO3) - CCT Europe Closed Qualifier: Series #16 Group D
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between  CSDIILIT and Atreides in the CCT Europe Closed Qualifier: Series #16 Group D, scheduled for February 13 at 1:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to " CSDIILIT" if  CSDIILIT win the match against Atreides.

This market will resolve to "Atreides" if Atreides win the match against  CSDIILIT.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org/.

question: Map Handicap: PHA (-1.5) vs los kogutos (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Phantom and los kogutos in the CCT Europe Series #15 Group Stage, scheduled for February 13 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Phantom" if Phantom wins 2 or more maps than los kogutos in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "los kogutos". 

Maps won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the handicap, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching map being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.
groupItemTitle: Map Handicap: PHA (-1.5) vs los kogutos (+1.5)

events.title: Counter-Strike: Phantom vs los kogutos (BO3) - CCT Europe Series #15 Group Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Phantom and los kogutos in the CCT Europe Series #15 Group Stage, scheduled for February 13 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Phantom" if Phantom win the match against los kogutos.

This market will resolve to "los kogutos" if los kogutos win the match against Phantom.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org/.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 14, 10PM ET
description:

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will Trump say "Joe" or "Biden" 3+ times at Fort Bragg on Friday?
description:
Donald Trump is set to deliver remarks at Fort Bragg on February 13, 2026 at 1:30 PM ET (https://rollcall.com/factbase/trump/calendar/). 

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump says the listed term during the event on February 13, 2026. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Pluralization/possessive of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g., joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however, "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

This market is explicitly about the event titled "The President delivers remarks to Fort Bragg Military Families" on February 13, 2026, at 1:30 PM ET (https://rollcall.com/factbase/trump/calendar/). Speeches, events, or comments that occur outside of the named, scheduled event will not qualify toward this market's resolution. If the event contains a Q&A, it will count toward the resolution of this market.

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

If this event is definitively cancelled, or otherwise is not aired by February 13, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, "-No Qualifying Event-" will resolve to "Yes" and all other brackets will resolve to "No".

The resolution source will be video of the events. Only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump says the listed term during the event on February 13, 2026. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Pluralization/possessive of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g., joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however, "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

This market is explicitly about the event titled "The President delivers remarks to Fort Bragg Military Families" on February 13, 2026, at 1:30 PM ET (https://rollcall.com/factbase/trump/calendar/). Speeches, events, or comments that occur outside of the named, scheduled event will not qualify toward this market's resolution. If the event contains a Q&A, it will count toward the resolution of this market.

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

If this event is definitively cancelled, or otherwise is not aired by February 13, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, "-No Qualifying Event-" will resolve to "Yes" and all other brackets will resolve to "No".

The resolution source will be video of the events. Only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution.

question: Counter-Strike: MANA eSports vs HOTU (BO3) - IstanbuLAN Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between MANA eSports and HOTU in the IstanbuLAN Playoffs, scheduled for February 13 at 10:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "MANA eSports" if MANA eSports win the match against HOTU.

This market will resolve to "HOTU" if HOTU win the match against MANA eSports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

question: Games Total: O/U 2.5
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between MANA eSports and HOTU in the IstanbuLAN Playoffs, scheduled for February 13 at 10:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if MANA eSports and HOTU play 3 or more maps in this series.

If fewer than 3 maps are played, this market will resolve to "Under".

Maps won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the total, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching map being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

question: LoL: ZYB Esport vs Lille Esport (BO1) - LFL Invitational Super Group
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between ZYB Esport and Lille Esport in the LFL Invitational Super Group, scheduled for February 13 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "ZYB Esport" if ZYB Esport win the match against Lille Esport.

This market will resolve to "Lille Esport" if Lille Esport win the match against ZYB Esport.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home, not including broadcasts, streams, or other video feeds.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 15, 12AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

events.title: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 15, 12AM ET
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.
